name: The Collapsed Foundry
description: A cathedral-vaulted hall opens here, the ruin of some ancient foundry that predates even the Emberdeep's delvers. Toppled casting-pits and shattered crucibles the size of wagons lie half-melted and refrozen, and a colonnade of buckled iron pillars sags under a ceiling that has partly fallen in, leaving a jagged wound of blackness overhead. Everything is scarred the same way: not merely burned but flensed, as though a heat far crueller than any forge swept through and left its signature on the very bones of the place. A pit of unbroken dark descends at the hall's far end.
ambient_messages: A buckled iron pillar groans under its ruined ceiling, shedding a slow trickle of dust and cinder.
Deep in a shattered crucible the refrozen slag pings as unseen heat works through it.
A cold, sulphurous draught wells up from the pit at the hall's end, and the scarred pillars seem to lean toward it.
